---
title: "The Black Band Disease Metagenome"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
## Background 





## Assembly 


sbatch flye/run_flye_bbd.sh


## Binning with Metabat


## Checking Bin Quality with Checkm 



## Functional Analysis of the BBD Metagenome


## Select Bins Based on Checkm Results


## Perform Taxonomic Classification with gtdbtk 



## Find and Annote Genes with Prokka
